respuesta_valida: {"setup": [{"tool": "get_account", "args": {"customer_id": "C-30"}}], "branches": [{"condition": {"field": "$1.status", "op": "==", "value": "active"}, "calls": [{"tool": "notify", "args": {"customer_id": "C-30", "message": "Your account is due for renewal. Please complete the renewal process to continue services."}}]}, {"condition": "else", "calls": [{"tool": "open_ticket", "args": {"customer_id": "C-30", "severity": "medium", "description": "Account is inactive and requires attention."}}]}]}

{"setup": [{"tool": "get_invoice", "args": {"customer_id": "C-12"}}], "branches": [{"condition": {"field": "$1.amount", "op": ">", "value": 500}, "calls": [{"tool": "notify", "args": {"customer_id": "C-12", "message": "Your invoice amount is greater than $500. We have an available payment plan for you."}}]}, {"condition": "else", "calls": [{"tool": "notify", "args": {"customer_id": "C-12", "message": "Your payment is due. Please make the payment for your invoice."}}]}]}

{"setup": [{"tool": "find_customer", "args": {"name": "Grace Chen"}}, {"tool": "get_account", "args": {"customer_id": "$1.id"}}, {"tool": "get_balance", "args": {"account_id": "$2.account_id"}}], "branches": [{"condition": {"field": "$3.balance", "op": ">=", "value": 5000}, "calls": [{"tool": "notify", "args": {"customer_id": "$1.id", "message": "You are eligible for the premium plan!"}}]}, {"condition": "else", "calls": [{"tool": "notify", "args": {"customer_id": "$1.id", "message": "You are eligible for the standard plan."}}]}]}
